cases.prompt: Analyze whether https://github.com/facebook/react is credible and suitable for production adoption, citing current evidence.

Produces a verifiable result or clearly identifies the blocker

cases.prompt: Assess a GitHub repository when the API is rate-limited and package registry data is unavailable; report confidence honestly.
pass_criteria: Uses the Skill's documented workflow and bundled resources

cases.prompt: Summarize the README of a GitHub repository without performing a credibility audit.
